message:
🐛 Fix dashboard flashing during first load (#289)

Eliminate the dark screen + spinner flash that appeared for ~50-200ms
on every dashboard page load. Three changes:

1. Cache authenticated user in localStorage (stale-while-revalidate)
   so auth resolves instantly on subsequent visits instead of showing
   a loading spinner while refreshUser() runs async.

2. Add a Suspense boundary inside Layout's <main> area so lazy-loaded
   page components suspend within the layout shell, keeping the
   sidebar and navbar visible during chunk loading.

3. Change ProtectedRoute to return null during the brief auth loading
   state instead of rendering a full-screen spinner that replaces the
   entire Layout.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
